meta.siteTitle: Christine Yuen, REALTOR® — Richmond, Vancouver East & West
meta.siteDescription: Christine Yuen, REALTOR® with Grand Central Realty. 26 years as a Chinese-English simultaneous interpreter and a Regulated Canadian Immigration Consultant. Helping families and investors across Richmond, Vancouver East and Vancouver West.

hero.body: Realtor and immigration consultant. Helping families and investors across Richmond, Vancouver East and Vancouver West.

tiles.title: First conversation
tiles.body: We meet over coffee or video. No pitch. I want to understand your timing, budget, and what 'home' actually means for you.

tiles.title: Market read
tiles.body: I pull the data on your shortlist and the comps that actually compete with them. You'll see what I see, in plain numbers.

tiles.title: Offer & close
tiles.body: I write the offer, run the negotiation in your language, and walk you through every clause. Closings shouldn't feel like a quiz.

tiles.title: After the move
tiles.body: Trades, contractors, school catchments, even the right strata bylaws to read first. The hard part isn't getting the keys.

testimonials.heading: Words from people I've worked with.
testimonials.emptyState: Still gathering quotes from recent clients — 2026 launch year. Reach out and you'll hear from someone I've helped.

currently.heading: What I'm representing right now.
currently.emptyState: No active listings this week. I'm working privately with three families on Richmond and Vancouver West searches — reach out if your move is in motion.

aboutSnippet.heading: 26 years of listening before talking.
aboutSnippet.paragraph1: For 26 years I worked as a Chinese-English simultaneous interpreter — boardrooms, market research, contracts. The job teaches you to listen for the thing under the thing: what someone will actually walk at, the constraint they haven't said, the difference between what a number says and what it means. That's most of what real estate is.
aboutSnippet.paragraph2: I'm a Regulated Canadian Immigration Consultant, so I help newcomer buyers move through the system without surprises. Cantonese fluent, Mandarin where it helps, English on the page. Whether it's your first home, your fifth, or an investment unit — start with a conversation.
aboutSnippet.pullQuote: Buying a home should feel like a conversation, not a negotiation against a clock.

contact.heading: Whenever you're ready.
contact.body: First conversation is no commitment. Email, text, or schedule below — whatever's easiest.
contact.privacy: No newsletter. No third-party data sales.
contact.altBrokerage: Grand Central Realty · 230-3700 North Fraser Way, Burnaby, BC V5J 5H4
